eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Seminole, FL; at 5:48 AM on SEP 10, 2019 Effective until 6:48 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS IS A TEST MESSAGE. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.
